summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MANO Rewards System and Email Notification features (Iteration 8). Backend: 21/21 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All rewards components working correctly - RewardsDashboard with level card, badges grid, leaderboard, and activity tabs.

minor.issue: Streak returns 0 when claiming multiple times on same day (expected behavior - streak only increments on consecutive days)

issues: Minor React warning: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' in BrowserRouter/Login - does not affect functionality

passed_tests: GET /api/rewards/badges - Returns all 10 badges with correct structure
GET /api/rewards - Returns user rewards data (points, level, badges, streak)
POST /api/rewards/claim-daily - Claims daily reward and returns points/streak
POST /api/email/test - Queues test email (SendGrid not configured)
Level thresholds correctly defined (Bronce 0-99, Plata 100-499, Oro 500-1999, Platino 2000-4999, Diamante 5000+)
Frontend: Dashboard has Recompensas button in header with Trophy icon
Frontend: Rewards page loads with level card showing points and progress
Frontend: Badges tab shows all 10 badges (2 unlocked: Primer Análisis, Pionero)
Frontend: Ranking tab shows leaderboard with Semanal/Mensual/Total filters
Frontend: Actividad tab shows activity history
Frontend: Claim daily reward button works and shows toast notification
critical_code_review_comments: Rewards service properly implements gamification with 5 levels and 10 badges
Email service correctly queues emails when SendGrid is not configured
All rewards endpoints have proper authentication checks
Level progression is correctly calculated with progress percentage
Leaderboard aggregation pipeline correctly joins user data
RewardsDashboard component properly displays all reward data with tabs
data-testid attributes present on key elements for testing
seed_data_creation: User rewards data created during testing via /api/rewards/claim-daily and /api/rewards/action endpoints

mocked_apis.email_service: Email Service - emails queued in database, SendGrid NOT configured (MOCKED)
mocked_apis.leaderboard: Leaderboard uses real user data from test users

context_for_next_testing_agent: Rewards and Email features fully tested: Rewards endpoints (rewards, claim-daily, leaderboard, badges, action/{action}), Email endpoints (preferences, test, queue). RewardsDashboard has 3 tabs: Insignias (badges grid), Ranking (leaderboard with period filters), Actividad (activity history). User has 130 points at Plata level with 2 badges unlocked. Email service queues emails when SendGrid is not configured.
